description: Known AI provider-cost gaps allowed temporarily after Phase 3.9. Member image, music, and video are intentionally excluded because they are gateway-migrated.

knownGaps.reason: Phase 4.3 hardens the charged Admin BFL image-test path with admin_org_credit_account budget-policy metadata, but the unmetered admin image branch still needs explicit platform budget telemetry.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Only the unmetered admin image branch is baselined; charged BFL admin image tests are hardened through the selected-organization credit path.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.2 admin AI budget policy contract/helpers
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: A later narrow admin image route phase should either disable unpriced provider-cost tests or move them to platform_admin_lab_budget controls without changing the charged BFL org-credit path.

knownGaps.reason: Synchronous admin video debug route is default-disabled but still needs explicit platform budget telemetry if retained.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Route is default-disabled and accepted only while Phase 4.2 defines explicit emergency/debug budget controls.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.2 admin AI budget policy contract/helpers
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Phase 4.2 defines pure budget policy helpers; the debug route should remain disabled unless both debug and budget kill switches are intentionally enabled.

knownGaps.reason: Internal AI Worker text/image/embeddings routes are service-only; Phase 4.7 validates supplied caller-policy metadata and Phase 4.8.1 supplies admin text/embeddings metadata plus caller-side durable idempotency, but missing caller-policy remains allowed for other known callers to avoid changing org/member behavior.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Internal routes are not public and missing caller-policy metadata remains baseline_allowed for remaining known callers until each caller is migrated.
knownGaps.killSwitchTarget: caller route budget kill switch required
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: A later targeted migration should require caller-supplied budget policy metadata for remaining internal text/image/embeddings callers and keep the routes service-only; admin text/embeddings already carry Phase 4.8.1 metadata and caller-side durable idempotency.

knownGaps.reason: Internal AI Worker music/sync-video/compare routes are service-only; Phase 4.7 validates supplied caller-policy metadata and requires it for async video task create/poll. Phase 4.9 supplies admin music caller metadata, Phase 4.10 supplies admin compare caller metadata, and Phase 4.12 requires Admin Live-Agent caller metadata. These broader baseline routes remain caller-migration gaps for other known callers/debug paths.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Internal routes are not public and Phase 4.7 classifies missing caller-policy metadata as baseline_allowed for known broad admin/debug routes until each remaining caller is migrated.
knownGaps.killSwitchTarget: caller route budget kill switch required
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Later targeted migrations should require caller-supplied budget policy metadata for any remaining internal music/sync-video/compare callers while keeping unrelated internal routes service-only and baseline-compatible until their own migrations.
